name: cm3
description: Modula-3 compiler and build tools (Critical Mass Modula-3)

subcommands.name: -make
subcommands.description: Build the current package and its dependencies

subcommands.name: -clean
subcommands.description: Remove derived files from build directory

subcommands.name: -ship
subcommands.description: Install the package in the system package pool

subcommands.name: -find
subcommands.description: Search for a package in the known package paths

globalOptions.name: -DROOT
globalOptions.description: Set the root directory for package search
